speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. As the lights drift out, at that moment, you watch as a series of shapes swoop in (squawking). In that instant, you watch as a cluster of harpies-- not coming towards you-- are now coming in and dive-bombing the sails. They're rushing in and trying to drag their claws through to put you dead in the water. From a narrative standpoint, go ahead and roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) Yasha's still here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Be careful, Beau." Puts the blade and leans it against the side of the cot and leans back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Just wanted to give you a quick update. Fjord saw a thing with two wings, appeared to be humanoid, flying off the boat, and just wanted to make sure--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Grabs the sword and gets back up and walks past you and up the stairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) Yasha's coming.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What the fuck was it, Fjord?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't know. I didn't see, it's too dark.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to turn around and do a scan of the horizon. Do I see anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Perception check, with disadvantage, because this is looking into far darkness.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll put my goggles on just in casies.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Just in casies, sure. But still at disadvantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Nine. Eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Glancing out, it looks like-- at this point, the moon is just starting to vanish in the distance, so there's not a lot of light, and it looks like a black, endless void around the ship with just a faint image of a blue line as a horizon in all directions.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I climb up to where it was and see if it left anything behind?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Like some poop.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Like poop, or a feather, or--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You make your way up. Go ahead and make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: A wallet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Look, personal identification.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You look and you can see-- it's dry, weathered wood; this mast has been in use for a while. You do see what appear to be some grooves, like large talons.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It had claws.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh hey. Rub a little phosphorus on and-- send a globule of light 120 feet in every direction from the boat, four of them, to see if there's anything.
